expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to Mode B: Apply based on the 'apply' keyword
Agent keeps the work scoped to src/auth/session.py unless a directly adjacent change is required
Agent reads references/simplification-taxonomy.md and references/behavior-preservation.md before editing
Agent reads references/output-formats.md to structure the Apply response
Agent applies only behavior-preserving simplifications such as flattening control flow or removing redundant indirection
Agent avoids bundling unrelated bug fixes, debt work, or perf-only changes
Agent reports what changed, why it is simpler, and what verification basis was used
